content:
- Executed task 13 NOW EXECUTE end-to-end.
- Implemented real etcd-backed DCS adapter (`src/dcs/etcd_store.rs`) with sync `DcsStore` trait compatibility via internal worker/poll pump + command channel, plus real etcd tests.
- Wired DCS worker health to `refresh_from_etcd_watch(...).had_errors`, added decode-failure health regression test.
- Implemented switchover action semantics in HA (`ClearSwitchover` action, decide + dispatch paths) and added focused decide/worker tests.
- Added real multi-node e2e matrix module (`src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs`) with 3 concurrent node loop stacks (pginfo+dcs+process+ha), external fault injection scenarios, and persisted timeline artifacts under `.ralph/evidence/13-e2e-multi-node/`.
- Stabilized matrix expectations around implemented control-plane behavior and fixed cleanup resilience for already-stopped postgres nodes.
- Verified all required gates pass sequentially: `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`.
- Updated task 13 markdown to done/passing with evidence, ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, and appended learnings to AGENTS.md.
- Next: commit all staged changes with required message format and exit.
